revision.comment: Support wider range of (valid) input format
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Category_link_with_count]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
Text replacement - "Category:{" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "Category:{" to "Category:"
Support wider range of (valid) input format
1 revision imported: importing these ahead in time so that it does not mess up
Support wider range of (valid) input format
Support wider range of (valid) input format
Support wider range of (valid) input format
1 revision imported: importing everything for the citation needed templates
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Support wider range of (valid) input format
1 revision imported
Support wider range of (valid) input format
Support wider range of (valid) input format
Support wider range of (valid) input format
Support wider range of (valid) input format
Support wider range of (valid) input format
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:30:43
update
nbsp, category
category
adding a second argument: default "all" but you can put in "pages" or "subcats" etc. as documented on [[mw:Help:Magic_words#Statistics]] and it passes it through to the magic word
{{Documentation|Template:Ln/doc}}
If parameter 1 starts with "Category:", remove it. This prevents red links, such as [[Category:Category:ABC]].
use different method to remove "Category:", previous method did not work with names such as [[Category:Côte-d'Or]]
adding an optional 'name' param which will override the display
revision.text: [[:Category:{{#ifeq:{{str left|{{{1}}}|9}}|Category:|{{str right|{{{1}}}|9}}|{{{1}}}}}|<!-- -->{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|Category:{{#ifeq:{{str left|{{{1}}}|9}}|Category:|{{str right|{{{1}}}|9}}|{{{1}}}}}}}<!-- -->]] ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{#ifeq:{{str left|{{{1}}}|9}}|Category:|{{str right|{{{1}}}|9}}|{{{1}}}}}|{{{2|all}}}}})<noinclude> {{Documentation|Template:Clc/doc}} [[Category:Internal category-link templates]] </noinclude>

update
nbsp, category
category
adding a second argument: default "all" but you can put in "pages" or "subcats" etc. as documented on [[mw:Help:Magic_words#Statistics]] and it passes it through to the magic word
{{Documentation|Template:Ln/doc}}
If parameter 1 starts with "Category:", remove it. This prevents red links, such as [[Category:Category:ABC]].
use different method to remove "Category:", previous method did not work with names such as [[Category:Côte-d'Or]]
adding an optional 'name' param which will override the display

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_link_with_count here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
